record.field: Industry HR demo data: Conditionally create admin user

# in case mitchell admin was created in the db in a previous version # or the user created their own admin employee from the admin user if not (admin_user := env.ref('base.user_admin')).employee_id: admin_user.action_create_employee() env['ir.model.data']._update_xmlids([{'xml_id': 'hr.employee_admin', 'record': admin_user.employee_id}]) fetch = lambda id: env['ir.model.data']._xmlid_to_res_id(id, raise_if_not_found=False) vals = [('name', "Casey Admin"), ('department_id', fetch('hr.dep_administration')), ('job_title', "Chief Executive Administrator"), ('address_id', fetch('base.main_partner')), ('work_phone', "+1 555-555-5555"), ('private_email', "administrator@private.example.com"), ('work_email', "administrator@yourcompany.example.com"), ('structure_type_id', fetch('hr.structure_type_employee')), ('image_1920', env.ref('base.partner_admin').image_1920)] admin = env.ref('hr.employee_admin') if (vals_to_write := {field: val for field, val in vals if not admin[field]}): admin.write(vals_to_write)
